title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Practo Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
